p.description: Probability of making a sale on each call (probability of success per trial).

r.description: Number of sales (successes) needed to achieve the daily goal, defining the 5th success in the negative binomial distribution.

lower_bound.description: Lower bound of the number of trials in the probability calculation P(15 ≤ Y ≤ 20).

upper_bound.description: Upper bound of the number of trials in the probability calculation P(15 ≤ Y ≤ 20).
